backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the YMW Compliance backend, implementing user profiles, customer account signup/login, and service request management with role-based access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented frontend features (primarily Services.tsx grid layout, spacing, and padding fixes) to test IDs, component dependencies, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with full SEO metadata, Open Graph/Twitter Card tags, JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data, and preload hints for critical assets for the YMW Compliance Services site.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that sets up TanStack Router with 17 lazy-loaded routes, a dark navy Layout wrapper with Navigation/Footer/FloatingCTA, and a React Query client provider.
frontend/src/components/Card.tsx: Simple reusable card component that applies civic-card styling with p-6 padding and an optional hover cursor, accepting children and a className override.
frontend/src/components/ConsultationPopu: A modal popup that appears after 5 seconds (once per session) offering a free consultation form with fields for name, phone, service selection, and city/state, submitting via a React Query mutation.
frontend/src/components/FloatingCTA.tsx: A fixed floating action button component in the bottom-right corner providing WhatsApp chat and phone call links with hover label tooltips.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick links, support links, and legal/policy navigation organized in a responsive grid layout.
frontend/src/components/FreeConsultation: A full-page section with an inline consultation request form (name, phone, service, city/state) that submits via mutation and shows a success state with a reference ID.
A simple full-screen loading spinner component used as a fallback during lazy-loaded route or component transitions.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop and mobile layouts, a hover-triggered services dropdown, customer session-aware auth links, and active route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A non-dismissible dialog modal that prompts new users to enter their name and email to complete their profile, submitting via a React Query mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerSession.ts: Provides utilities and a hook for storing, retrieving, and clearing a customer session object in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, blog posts, contact messages, grievances, consultation requests, and customer/service-request operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, defines a navy/gold dark-theme CSS variable system, and provides reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a Tailwind class merger (`cn`) and helper functions for formatting nanosecond backend timestamps into human-readable date strings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page component displaying company stats, core values, team members, and a free consultation CTA section for YMW Compliance Services.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Password-protected admin panel that displays filterable tables of all customers and service requests fetched via React Query hooks. Uses session storage to persist admin authentication state.
frontend/src/pages/Blog.tsx: Blog listing page that fetches and displays blog posts with expand/collapse functionality, loading skeletons, and an empty/error state. Includes a hero section and a free consultation CTA at the bottom.
frontend/src/pages/ConfidentialityPolicy: Static page rendering YMW Compliance Services' confidentiality policy as a series of predefined sections with a hero header and a free consultation section at the bottom.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with company info cards (phone, email, address, hours) and a form that submits messages via a React Query mutation, showing a success state with a reference ID on completion.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Authenticated customer dashboard allowing logged-in users to submit service requests from a predefined list, view their request history, and access WhatsApp/email document upload shortcuts. Redirects to login if no session is found.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLogin.tsx: Renders the customer login page with an email/password form, validates credentials via the `useLoginCustomer` mutation, stores the session using `setCustomerSession`, and redirects to the customer dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerSignup.tsx: Renders the customer registration page with a signup form (name, mobile, email, password, business name), validates inputs, calls the `useSignupCustomer` mutation, and redirects to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx: Displays a static disclaimer page for YMW Compliance Services with eight sections covering general disclaimers, legal advice limitations, liability, and contact information.
frontend/src/pages/Grievance.tsx: Renders a grievance submission page with a categorized form (cleanliness, noise, safety, etc.), submits data via the `useSubmitGrievance` mutation, and shows a reference number on success.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the main landing page featuring a hero section, featured services grid, stats, company strengths, and a free consultation request form with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicy.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page for YMW Compliance Services LLP, displaying eight policy sections (data collection, usage, security, third-party sharing, user rights, cookies, changes, and contact) along with a hero header and a FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/RefundPolicy.tsx: Renders the Refund Policy page for YMW Compliance Services LLP, covering eligibility, non-refundable items, request process, timelines, partial refunds, cancellation policy, and contact info, with a hero header and FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Displays a comprehensive Services page listing all YMW Compliance service categories (business registration, tax/GST, ISO certification, compliance, government licenses, labour, startup, etc.) with features per category, badges, and a FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/Signup.tsx: Implements the authentication page using Internet Identity, handling login/logout, auto-registering new users on first login, showing a profile setup modal when no profile exists, and displaying user profile info when authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/SocialMedia.tsx: Renders a Social Media page listing YMW Compliance's presence on six platforms (X, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, GitHub) as clickable cards with icons, follower counts, and descriptions, plus a FreeConsultationSection.
frontend/src/pages/TermsAndConditions.ts: Renders the Terms & Conditions page for YMW Compliance Services LLP with nine legal sections (acceptance, use, IP, fees, liability, warranties, jurisdiction, amendments, contact) and a free consultation section at the bottom.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark-mode support, custom font families (Inter/Poppins), an extended color palette (navy, gold, civic aliases), border radii, box shadows, and plugins for animations, typography, and container queries.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 37) for the YMW Compliance Services multi-page React site, documenting existing features, architectural notes, and known issues such as auth bugs and service card layout inconsistencies.
